name: Aqatillion
short_description: A retro RPG that combines fantasy and sci-fi elements into a time-traveling adventure. Help Stenobar Floreston and his friends uncover a plot that threatens the world of Neria in two separate timelines.
detailed_description:
What is this?

Aqatillion is a retro-styled turn-based RPG with both fantasy and sci-fi story elements.

Features

Multiple difficulty levels
Turn-based battle system
Multiple party members to recruit
Secret characters
A secondary plotline with a mystery to unravel
Multiple endings

The Story

A man named Stenobar Floreston is something of a local hero. He lives in the village of Newham, on an island in the world of Neria in the year 273. In recent days, the wildlife of the island has become aggressive, and Stenobar goes out to find the source of the change in the monsters. During his journey, he finds a cave in a mountain and, upon exploring it, stumbles upon a scientist named Ghovere. Using his technology, Ghovere sends Stenobar to the future against his will.

Help Stenobar return to his own time and save the world of Neria from the sinister experiments of Ghovere.
